corrections.text: The article quotes Google's announcement as saying the model is "small enough to run locally on consumer laptops with 16GB of RAM." Google's announcement actually reads, under "Laptop ready": "Small enough to run locally with just 16GB of VRAM or unified memory." The 16GB / laptop-ready point is accurate; the quoted wording should read "VRAM or unified memory" rather than "consumer laptops with 16GB of RAM."
